nodes.label: GammaLedger
nodes.description: Privacy-first, local-first options trading journal and analytics dashboard. Single-page web application built with TypeScript + Vite, compiled from ~60 ES modules into a single JS bundle.

nodes.label: AGENTS.md — AI Agent Code Context
nodes.description: Comprehensive AI agent context document covering architecture, data model, key methods, non-negotiable rules, and development guidelines for GammaLedger.

nodes.label: CLAUDE.md
nodes.description: Claude agent instructions file. References AGENTS.md for full context.

nodes.label: CONTRIBUTING.md
nodes.description: Contributor guidelines covering bug reports, feature suggestions, code contributions, PR process, coding standards, and testing guidelines.

nodes.label: DEVELOPERS.md — Developer Guide
nodes.description: Developer guide covering prerequisites, project structure, dev workflow, TypeScript setup, building, deployment to GitHub Pages, path aliases, key conventions, and smoke test checklist.

nodes.label: README.md
nodes.description: Main project README with overview, v2 highlights, features, quick start guide, usage instructions, FAQ, contributing guide, license info, and disclaimer.

nodes.label: index.html — SPA Shell
nodes.description: Main SPA shell defining all views (dashboard, trades-list, credit-playbook, add-trade, import, settings), sidebar navigation, AI chat panel, share card, modals, and announcement banner.

nodes.label: GitHub Copilot Instructions
nodes.description: GitHub Copilot context document with commands, high-level architecture, and key conventions for the GammaLedger codebase.

nodes.label: GitHub Funding Configuration
nodes.description: GitHub Sponsors funding configuration pointing to the r-brown account.

nodes.label: App Release & Deploy Workflow
nodes.description: GitHub Actions workflow for building, packaging, and deploying the GammaLedger SPA to GitHub Pages at /app/, including version resolution, type checking, ZIP packaging, and GitHub Release creation.

nodes.label: MCP Release & Publish Workflow
nodes.description: GitHub Actions workflow for releasing the MCP Python package: runs pre-publish checks (ruff, mypy, pytest), builds wheel/sdist, publishes to PyPI via OIDC trusted publishing, and creates a GitHub Release.

nodes.label: Website Deploy Workflow
nodes.description: GitHub Actions workflow for building the Jekyll marketing site from website/ and deploying to the gh-pages root, preserving /app/ and /appv1/ subdirectories.

nodes.label: MCP Server README
nodes.description: Documentation for the GammaLedger MCP server: Model Context Protocol server exposing the local trading journal to AI agents. Covers install/run with uvx, AI client integration (Claude Desktop, Claude Code), tools, prompts, and development workflow.

nodes.label: Website README
nodes.description: Documentation for the Jekyll-powered marketing site at gammaledger.com. Covers setup, structure, adding blog posts, and deployment.

nodes.label: GammaLedger Banner 01
nodes.description: Marketing banner image showing a 3D candlestick chart (green and red candles) on a dark blue background with floating UI icons (upward trend arrow, chat bubble, clock/timer).

nodes.label: GammaLedger Banner 02
nodes.description: Abstract marketing banner showing a glowing purple/blue sine wave (gamma curve) on a dark background. No text.

nodes.label: GammaLedger Banner 03
nodes.description: Abstract marketing banner with the same glowing purple/blue gamma curve, with 'GAMMALEDGER' text in bold white italic font at bottom-left.

nodes.label: GammaLedger Dashboard Screenshot
nodes.description: Screenshot of the GammaLedger dashboard showing: metric cards (Total P&L $1,497.11, Win Rate 83.6%, Profit Factor 2.64, Active Positions 20, Total ROI 4.03%, Max Drawdown 72.6%), Monthly P&L Performance bar chart (Dec 2024–Sep 2025), and Cumulative P&L Growth line chart.

nodes.label: GammaLedger Logo (Background)
nodes.description: GammaLedger logo: stylized gamma (Γ) letter in purple-to-blue gradient, enclosed in a circular ring, on a white/transparent background.

nodes.label: GammaLedger Logo (Main)
nodes.description: GammaLedger logo: stylized gamma (Γ) letter in purple-to-blue gradient, enclosed in a circular ring, on a black background.

nodes.label: GammaLedger Logo 16x16
nodes.description: Favicon-sized GammaLedger logo (16x16px): small purple gamma symbol in circle.

nodes.label: GammaLedger Logo 32x32
nodes.description: Small GammaLedger logo (32x32px): purple gamma symbol in circle, used for sidebar brand and favicon.

nodes.label: GammaLedger Logo 64x64
nodes.description: Medium GammaLedger logo (64x64px): purple gamma symbol in circle, used for favicon and sidebar.

nodes.label: GammaLedger Class
nodes.description: Main application class instantiated as window.tracker. Owns all state, imports every feature module, and wires methods as thin delegators using .call(this) pattern. Located in src/index.ts (~1,711 lines).

nodes.label: Delegation Pattern
nodes.description: Architectural pattern where GammaLedger class delegates to feature module functions via .call(this, ...). Feature modules export plain functions with a this: SomeContext interface. No module-level mutable state.

nodes.label: RiskValue Tagged Union
nodes.description: Typed union for maxRisk/capitalAtRisk that replaces Infinity sentinel. Finite risks use finiteRisk(amount), unlimited uses UNLIMITED_RISK. Helpers: toRiskValue(), isFiniteRisk().

nodes.label: mcpContext
nodes.description: Pre-computed analytics snapshot written into every saved JSON database. Built by buildMCPContext() in src/integrations/mcp.ts. Contains portfolio, activePositions, wheelPmccPositions, recentClosedTrades, strategyBreakdown, tickerExposure, underlyingBreakdown, concentration, asOfDate, generatedAt.

nodes.label: RUNTIME_TRADE_FIELDS
nodes.description: Set of trade fields computed at runtime by enrichTradeData(). Never read back from raw storage as canonical values. Stripped before localStorage write but included in saved JSON for MCP server.

nodes.label: safeLocalStorage
nodes.description: Wrapper around localStorage from src/core/storage.ts. Handles quota errors, private-mode failures, and logs warnings. Direct localStorage access is prohibited.

nodes.label: parseStorageSchema()
nodes.description: Mandatory migration and validation guard in src/core/migration.ts. Migrates and validates any payload (including legacy formats) before it reaches the application. Used by localStorage load/save paths and user JSON imports.

nodes.label: Trade Object
nodes.description: Core data model with persisted fields (id, ticker, strategy, status, underlyingType, dates, exitReason, notes, legs) and runtime-enriched fields (pl, roi, riskValue, cashFlow, etc.) computed by enrichTradeData().

nodes.label: PersistedLeg Object
nodes.description: Leg-level data model with fields: id, orderType (BTO/STO/BTC/STC), type (CALL/PUT/STOCK/CASH), quantity, multiplier, strike, premium, fees, executionDate, expirationDate.

nodes.label: Storage Schema
nodes.description: Compound document under GammaLedgerLocalDatabase key: { version: '2.5', trades: Trade[], exportDate: ISOTimestamp, mcpContext?: MCPContext }. Validated by Zod schemas in src/core/schema.ts.

nodes.label: Type Library (src/types/)
nodes.description: 17 domain type files covering common types, leg, trade, leg-summary, lifecycle, stats, storage, state, integrations, imports, ai. Barrel-exported via @types-gl.

nodes.label: Views / Navigation
nodes.description: Six SPA views: dashboard, trades-list, credit-playbook, add-trade, import, settings. Only one active at a time. Navigation via showView() in src/ui/views.ts.

nodes.label: Apache ECharts Integration
nodes.description: 10 chart types using ECharts via npm: monthlyPL, cumulativePL, strategy, winRate, commissionImpact, timeInTrade, monteCarlo, sharpeGauge, sortinoGauge, tickerHeatmap. Updated via renderEChart(...).

nodes.label: AG Grid Community Tables
nodes.description: Trade-facing tables using AG Grid Community: All Trades, Active Positions, Recent Closed Trades, Assigned Positions, Credit Playbook. Uses theme: 'legacy' with ag-grid.css + ag-theme-quartz.css.

nodes.label: Gemini AI Coach
nodes.description: Google Gemini-powered AI coach in src/ai/gemini-agent.ts. Uses encrypted API key, sends mcpContext + query to generateContent endpoint. Falls back to LocalInsightsAgent on failure. Requires AI_COACH_CONSENT_STORAGE_KEY flag.

nodes.label: Local AI Coach
nodes.description: Offline rule-based AI coach in src/ai/local-agent.ts. Analyzes open positions for risk, P&L summary, streak patterns, and recommendations. Fallback when Gemini is unavailable.

nodes.label: MCP Server
nodes.description: Standalone Python package (gammaledger-mcp) in mcp/ directory exposing the GammaLedger database as an MCP server for AI clients. Read-only, local-first, uses mcpContext as source of truth.

nodes.label: Import / Export System
nodes.description: Import OFX (src/imports/ofx.ts), Robinhood CSV (src/imports/robinhood.ts), JSON restore (validated by parseStorageSchema). Export JSON backup, CSV (src/utils/export.ts), Share Card PNG via Canvas API.

nodes.label: CSS Design System
nodes.description: CSS custom properties in layers: primitive tokens, brand tokens, semantic tokens, dark mode overrides. Font: Inter. All sizing in rem. Layout: CSS Grid + Flexbox.

nodes.label: Non-Negotiable Rules
nodes.description: Hard constraints: no React/Vue frameworks, no CDN scripts, no Infinity sentinels, no direct localStorage, no skipping enrichTradeData(), no reading RUNTIME_TRADE_FIELDS from storage, no as casts on external JSON, no module-level mutable state.

nodes.label: Superpowers Workflow
nodes.description: Development workflow: brainstorm → write-plan → execute-plan. Skills auto-trigger based on task type. Enforces TDD, YAGNI, DRY principles. Plans stored in .plan.md files.

nodes.label: TDD in GammaLedger
nodes.description: TDD approach: TypeScript as first test (typecheck must fail before implementation), tests/ JSON fixtures, strict subproject checks, manual smoke test. Red → Green → Refactor cycle.

nodes.label: Path Aliases
nodes.description: Import aliases defined in tsconfig.json and vite.config.ts: @core/*, @trades/*, @calculations/*, @ui/*, @utils/*, @types-gl, @types-gl/*.

nodes.label: TypeScript Strict Subprojects
nodes.description: Seven subdirectories with strict: true tsconfig: calculations, core, trades, utils, ui, imports, integrations. Checked via npm run typecheck:strict.

nodes.label: localStorage Keys
nodes.description: Nine localStorage keys: GammaLedgerLocalDatabase, GammaLedgerGeminiConfig, GammaLedgerGeminiSecret, GammaLedgerGeminiMaxTokens, GammaLedgerDisclaimerAcceptedAt, GammaLedgerSidebarCollapsed, GammaLedgerDefaultFeePerContract, GammaLedgerFinnhubRateLimit, GammaLedgerAICoachConsentAt.

nodes.label: APP_CONFIG
nodes.description: Frozen constants object in src/core/config.ts with GEMINI, STORAGE, SHARE_CARD, PL_RANGES sub-objects. Also exports RUNTIME_TRADE_FIELDS, RUNTIME_LEG_FIELDS, CURRENT_STORAGE_VERSION ('2.5').

nodes.label: Zod Schemas
nodes.description: Validation schemas in src/core/schema.ts: StorageSchema, TradeFormInputSchema, LegFormInputSchema. Used for storage payload validation and form input validation.

nodes.label: Finnhub Integration
nodes.description: Live quote client in src/integrations/finnhub.ts. Fetches real-time market data for table cells. Rate-limited via GammaLedgerFinnhubRateLimit localStorage setting.

nodes.label: Share Card
nodes.description: 1080x1080px PNG export via Canvas API in src/ui/share-card.ts. Renders portfolio snapshot with P&L metrics and cumulative chart for social media sharing.

nodes.label: Security Practices
nodes.description: Input sanitization via sanitizeString(), numeric validation via validateNumber(), API key encryption with Web Crypto API, typed API response validation, CSP meta tag, security headers, textContent for user data, strict-origin-when-cross-origin referrer policy.

nodes.label: Wheel Strategy Tracker
nodes.description: Wheel strategy tracking in src/trades/wheel.ts. Handles cash-secured put assignment → covered call lifecycle. Auto-status promotes covered Wheel trades to Open; Assigned means shares held with no active short call.

nodes.label: PMCC Strategy Tracker
nodes.description: Poor Man's Covered Call tracking in src/trades/pmcc.ts. Tracks long call + short call diagonal spread lifecycle with pmccShortExpiration and longExpirationDate fields.

nodes.label: Monte Carlo Projection
nodes.description: 60-day Monte Carlo projection chart in src/calculations/monte-carlo.ts. Multi-path line chart for portfolio performance simulation.

nodes.label: Portfolio Summary
nodes.description: Aggregated portfolio metrics: counts, P&L, win rate, profit factor, Sharpe/Sortino ratios, drawdown, expectancy, streaks. Computed by calculateAdvancedStats() in src/calculations/stats.ts.

nodes.label: 63 Supported Strategies
nodes.description: All 63 supported options strategies in the trade entry form: from Cash-Secured Put and Covered Call to Iron Butterfly, Wheel, and Synthetic positions. Includes Bear/Bull Call/Put Spreads, Calendar spreads, Diagonals, Condors, Butterflies, Straddles, Strangles, and exotic strategies.

nodes.label: Dashboard View
nodes.description: Main dashboard view with: grouped metrics, performance trend chart (7D/MTD/1M/3M/YTD/1Y/ALL), strategy performance, win rate, commission impact, ticker heatmap, time in trade, Monte Carlo projection, active positions table, recent closed trades table, and Wheel/PMCC tracker.

nodes.label: Add Trade View
nodes.description: Multi-leg trade entry form with fields: ticker, underlying type, strategy, trade status (auto or override), exit reason, notes, and dynamic leg container. Supports 63 strategies.

nodes.label: All Trades View
nodes.description: Trades list view with: filters (strategy, status), search by ticker/strategy/notes, merge trades by ticker, export CSV, AG Grid table with select-all, trade detail panel.

nodes.label: Import View
nodes.description: Import wizard supporting OFX files, Robinhood CSV, and AI screenshot extraction. Features drag-and-drop, import summary, review queue with approve/merge/discard, import log, and detailed import tips.

nodes.label: Settings View
nodes.description: Settings view with: Finnhub API key + rate limit, Gemini API key + model selection + max tokens, and default fee per contract. All keys encrypted and stored locally.

nodes.label: AI Coach Chat Panel
nodes.description: Floating AI chat panel with: message history, text input, image attachment (trade screenshots), quick prompts (Portfolio health, Risk check, Strategy ideas), draft import section, resize handle, and consent modal.

nodes.label: Credit Playbook View
nodes.description: Credit strategy tracker with: credit playbook metrics, filters (status, time horizon, strategy, symbol), and AG Grid table. Tracks option premium legs for Wheel trades.

nodes.label: Disclaimer Modal
nodes.description: Legal disclaimer dialog explaining: educational/analytical purposes only, no financial advice, options risk disclosure, data storage responsibility, and terms acceptance.

nodes.label: AI Coach Consent Modal
nodes.description: AI data sharing consent dialog explaining: portfolio data sent to AI Agent, local key storage, session-only data use, and revocation via Settings.

nodes.label: Announcement Banner
nodes.description: Configurable announcement banner (ANNOUNCEMENT_BANNER_CONFIG) for version announcements. Currently shows 'Welcome to GammaLedger v2' with link back to v1.

nodes.label: App Release Workflow Details
nodes.description: Manual workflow: resolves version (semver bump), runs typecheck, builds local ZIP (base ./), rebuilds for GitHub Pages (base /app/), merges into gh-pages branch preserving /app/ and /appv1/, creates GitHub Release with ZIP and SHA256.

nodes.label: MCP Release Workflow Details
nodes.description: Manual workflow: pre-publish checks (ruff lint, ruff format, mypy, pytest), builds wheel/sdist with uv build, publishes to PyPI via OIDC trusted publishing, creates GitHub Release with mcp- tag prefix.

nodes.label: Website Deploy Workflow Details
nodes.description: Auto-triggered on push to website/ on main. Builds Jekyll site with Ruby 3.3, copies output to gh-pages root preserving /app/ and /appv1/, commits and pushes.

nodes.label: MCP Tools (15 tools)
nodes.description: 15 MCP tools: get_database_info, get_portfolio_summary, get_pl_breakdown, get_open_positions, get_position, get_wheel_pmcc_positions, get_recent_closed_trades, get_strategy_breakdown, get_ticker_exposure, get_underlying_breakdown, get_concentration_risk, get_expiring_positions, audit_risk, audit_wheel_pmcc, search_trades.

nodes.label: MCP Prompts (5 prompts)
nodes.description: 5 MCP prompts: analyze_portfolio, risk_audit, wheel_pmcc_review, weekly_review, position_inspect.

nodes.label: Jekyll Marketing Website
nodes.description: Jekyll-powered marketing site at gammaledger.com. Structure: _config.yml, Gemfile, index.html, blog/, privacy.html, terms.html, disclaimer.html, _layouts/, _includes/, _posts/, assets/css/, sitemap.xml.

nodes.label: GammaLedger v2 Highlights
nodes.description: v2 features: rebuilt on Vite, improved Wheel & PMCC tracker, AI-powered analysis (Claude + Gemini), OFX/QFX import, local-first architecture, multi-strategy support.

nodes.label: Key Features
nodes.description: Feature categories: Advanced Strategy Analytics, AI-Powered Trading Coach, Local-First Data Architecture, Unified Dashboard, Powerful Trade Management, Portfolio Sharing & Export.

nodes.label: Broker Import Support
nodes.description: Supported brokers for OFX import: Interactive Brokers, TD Ameritrade, Charles Schwab, E*TRADE, Fidelity. Also supports Robinhood CSV and AI screenshot extraction.

nodes.label: AGPLv3 License
nodes.description: Open source license for non-commercial use. Commercial license available separately with no copyleft, priority support, and custom features.

nodes.label: Target User Segments
nodes.description: Three target user segments: Active Traders (multi-leg strategies, Greeks monitoring), Portfolio Managers (cross-account consolidation, client reports), Quantitative Analysts (backtesting, custom metrics).

nodes.label: GitHub Sponsors
nodes.description: GitHub Sponsors configured for the r-brown account.

nodes.label: npm Scripts
nodes.description: Four main npm scripts: dev (Vite dev server at localhost:5173), build (typecheck + Vite bundle to dist/), preview (serve dist/ at localhost:4173), typecheck (tsc --noEmit).

nodes.label: Contribution Areas
nodes.description: Areas needing help: bug fixes, new strategy support (butterflies, calendars, diagonals), broker integrations (TD Ameritrade, Schwab, E*TRADE), UI/UX, documentation, testing, internationalization, AI coach enhancements, performance optimization, accessibility.

nodes.label: Smoke Test Checklist
nodes.description: 13-point checklist: typecheck passes, dev server loads, dashboard renders, trade persists, Wheel/PMCC shows, P&L correct, dates display, CSV export/import, charts render, modals work, build succeeds, preview loads.

nodes.label: Jekyll Site Configuration
nodes.description: Jekyll configuration for GammaLedger website: title, description, URL, permalink structure, kramdown markdown, jekyll-feed plugin, and post defaults

nodes.label: Risk Disclaimer Page
nodes.description: 13-section legal risk disclaimer covering options/derivatives risk, AI output risk, market data risk, software/local storage risk, no-broker status, and limitation of liability

nodes.label: GammaLedger Homepage
nodes.description: Landing page with hero section, features grid (strategy analytics, privacy, dashboard, multi-strategy, performance, trade management), stats, target users (active traders, portfolio managers, quant analysts), and CTA

nodes.label: Privacy Policy Page
nodes.description: 16-section privacy policy covering local storage, optional integrations (market data APIs, AI providers), data minimization, security, and international use

nodes.label: Terms of Service Page
nodes.description: 16-section terms of service covering AGPLv3 license, no-financial-advice clause, AI features, local storage, third-party services, acceptable use, and liability limitations

nodes.label: Site Footer Component
nodes.description: Site footer with resources links (blog, GitHub, docs, releases), legal links (terms, privacy, disclaimer, AGPLv3), and copyright notice

nodes.label: Site Head Component
nodes.description: HTML head with meta tags (Open Graph, Twitter Card), Google Fonts (Inter), favicons, and conditional CSS loading for blog/home layouts

nodes.label: Site Navigation Component
nodes.description: Top navigation bar with links to Features, Dashboard, For You, Blog, GitHub, and Launch App button

nodes.label: Default Layout
nodes.description: Base HTML layout including head, nav, content block, and footer includes

nodes.label: Page Layout
nodes.description: Page layout extending default layout, used for legal pages (terms, privacy, disclaimer)

nodes.label: Blog Post Layout
nodes.description: Blog post layout with article container, featured image, title, date/author meta, tags, content, and article disclaimer

nodes.label: Getting Started with GammaLedger
nodes.description: Tutorial on setting up GammaLedger: importing trades (OFX/CSV/JSON), exploring dashboard, Finnhub API integration, strategy tracking (Wheel, PMCC, credit spreads, iron condors), privacy-first architecture, backup tips

nodes.label: Options Trading Glossary
nodes.description: Comprehensive glossary of options terms: basic option terms (call, put, strike, premium, ITM/ATM/OTM), trading actions (BTO/STO/BTC/STC), strategies (covered call, CSP, wheel, PMCC, credit spread, iron condor, straddle), Greeks (delta, gamma, theta, vega, rho), P&L terms, volatility terms, position management, and GammaLedger-specific terms

nodes.label: Essential Options Strategies for 2025
nodes.description: Beginner guide to capital-efficient strategies: vertical spreads (bull put, bear call, bull call, bear put), long calls/puts, iron condors, calendar spreads, cash-secured puts, PMCC; includes risk management essentials (position sizing, stop losses, diversification) and common mistakes

nodes.label: Options Trading Analytics Guide
nodes.description: Deep dive into Delta and Gamma Greeks: delta as directional compass and probability indicator, gamma as acceleration factor, two-week exit rule, gamma scalping; practical analytics workflow (pre-trade, in-trade, post-trade); probability analysis, EV calculation, break-even analysis

nodes.label: Weekly Options Strategies
nodes.description: Strategies for weekly options: weekly CSPs, weekly covered calls, weekly credit spreads, weekly iron condors, weekly strangles, earnings IV crush; risk management for weeklies (position sizing, Greeks, time management, profit-taking discipline); advanced approaches (ladder, barbell, rotation)

nodes.label: Advanced Options Spreads
nodes.description: Detailed guides on iron condors (structure, strike selection, management), butterfly spreads (standard, broken-wing, iron butterfly), and calendar spreads (neutral, diagonal, double); comparison table of risk/reward, probability, and capital efficiency

nodes.label: Straddle and Strangle Strategies
nodes.description: Volatility-based strategies: selling straddles/strangles in high IV, iron condors in range-bound markets, debit spreads and risk reversals for directional plays; long straddle, long strangle, short straddle, short strangle; IV crush play, volatility pairs trading, calendar straddles

nodes.label: GammaLedger Setup Tutorial
nodes.description: 10-part tutorial: initial setup, importing trades (manual, OFX/CSV, API), dashboard walkthrough, logging different strategy types, position management, advanced analytics (performance reports, risk metrics, Greek analytics), custom features (watchlists, trade rules, tags), review workflow, troubleshooting, integrations

nodes.label: Risk Management Techniques
nodes.description: 10 risk management rules: 2% rule, portfolio diversification (by symbol/sector/strategy/expiration), define risk before entering, stop losses (price/percentage/time-based), position sizing via Kelly Criterion, manage Greek exposure (delta/theta/vega/gamma), hedging (protective puts, tail risk), layering, avoid binary events, emergency plan

nodes.label: Time Decay and Volatility in Options Pricing
nodes.description: Theta and Vega Greeks: theta as time decay (acceleration near expiration), profiting from theta (naked calls, credit spreads), theta vs gamma trade-off; vega as volatility sensitivity, IV crush, mean reversion; calendar spreads as theta+vega play; two-week exit rule; position selection matrix by IV rank

nodes.label: Delta Neutral Strategies
nodes.description: Delta neutral trading: straddle seller, iron butterfly, ratio spreads, delta neutral calendar, covered stock position; managing delta (rebalancing, dynamic hedging); gamma scalping; portfolio-level delta management (beta-weighted delta, sector neutrality); real-world monthly income example

nodes.label: Covered Call
nodes.description: Owning 100+ shares and selling a call option against them; generates income but caps upside; conservative income strategy

nodes.label: Cash-Secured Put (CSP)
nodes.description: Selling a put option while holding enough cash to purchase shares if assigned; generates income and potentially acquires stock at a discount

nodes.label: Wheel Strategy
nodes.description: Systematic approach: Sell CSPs → Get assigned → Sell covered calls → Repeat; income-generating cycle

nodes.label: Poor Man's Covered Call (PMCC)
nodes.description: Buying a deep ITM LEAP call and selling shorter-term OTM calls against it; cheaper alternative to owning 100 shares; diagonal spread

nodes.label: Iron Condor
nodes.description: Combines bull put spread and bear call spread; profits from range-bound markets and time decay; defined risk; 60-75% probability of profit

nodes.label: Butterfly Spread
nodes.description: Precision instrument combining bull and bear spreads at same strikes; profiting from stocks staying near specific price; low capital, asymmetric risk/reward

nodes.label: Calendar Spread
nodes.description: Sell near-term option and buy longer-term option at same strike; profits from time decay differential and volatility expansion

nodes.label: Straddle
nodes.description: Buying (long) or selling (short) both a call and put at same strike and expiration; bets on volatility (long) or lack thereof (short)

nodes.label: Strangle
nodes.description: Buying or selling OTM call and put at different strikes; lower cost than straddle but requires larger move for profit

nodes.label: Vertical Spread
nodes.description: Generic term for spreads using options at different strikes but same expiration; includes bull put, bear call, bull call, bear put spreads; defined-risk strategies

nodes.label: Credit Spread
nodes.description: Selling one option and buying another of same type at different strikes; collects net credit upfront; defined-risk income strategy

nodes.label: Iron Butterfly
nodes.description: Delta neutral version of iron condor centered at current price; buy OTM put, sell 2 ATM options, buy OTM call; defined risk with high premium collection

nodes.label: Risk Reversal
nodes.description: Buy a call and sell a put (or vice versa) to express directional view with limited upfront cost; sold put finances purchased call

nodes.label: Delta Neutral Trading
nodes.description: Portfolio with net delta of zero; profit from theta and vega changes regardless of market direction; requires active rebalancing

nodes.label: Delta (Greek)
nodes.description: Rate of change in option price relative to $1 move in underlying; call delta 0 to +1.0, put delta -1.0 to 0; approximates probability of expiring ITM; used for position sizing and hedging

nodes.label: Gamma (Greek)
nodes.description: Rate of change of delta; measures how fast delta changes as stock price moves; highest for ATM options near expiration; positive for long options, negative for short options; major risk factor near expiration

nodes.label: Theta (Greek)
nodes.description: Time decay; amount option loses in value per day; always negative for long options; accelerates near expiration; fundamental to premium selling strategies

nodes.label: Vega (Greek)
nodes.description: Sensitivity to implied volatility changes; higher vega = more sensitive to volatility shifts; critical for volatility-based strategies

nodes.label: Implied Volatility (IV)
nodes.description: Market's expectation of future volatility derived from option prices; higher IV = more expensive options; IV rank and IV percentile measure relative IV levels

nodes.label: IV Crush
nodes.description: Sharp drop in implied volatility after an event (e.g., earnings), causing rapid option value decrease even if stock price doesn't move much; opportunity for premium sellers

nodes.label: Theta Decay (Time Decay)
nodes.description: Daily erosion of option value due to time passing; accelerates as expiration approaches; accelerates dramatically in final 30 days

nodes.label: Position Sizing
nodes.description: Determining how much capital to allocate to each trade; 2% rule (never risk more than 2% of portfolio per trade); Kelly Criterion for optimal sizing

nodes.label: 2% Rule
nodes.description: Never risk more than 2% of total portfolio on a single trade; allows 50 consecutive losses before depleting account; conservative (1%), moderate (2%), aggressive (3-5%) scaling

nodes.label: Portfolio Diversification
nodes.description: Spread risk across different symbols (max 15-20% per underlying), sectors, strategies, and expirations; prevents concentrated losses from single events

nodes.label: Stop Losses
nodes.description: Exit rules before entering trades: price-based stops, percentage-based stops (50% profit rule, 200% loss rule), time-based stops (< 7 DTE exit); discipline is key

nodes.label: Kelly Criterion
nodes.description: Mathematical formula for optimal position sizing: (Win Rate × Avg Win - Loss Rate × Avg Loss) / Avg Win; use Half Kelly for conservative sizing

nodes.label: Gamma Scalping
nodes.description: Advanced strategy taking advantage of gamma effect; establish delta neutral position, rebalance by trading stock as delta changes, capture small profits from each rebalance

nodes.label: Two-Week Exit Rule
nodes.description: Exit time decay strategies at least 2 weeks before expiration to avoid gamma risk; gamma increases exponentially near expiration making small stock moves cause large P&L swings

nodes.label: Defined Risk Strategies
nodes.description: Strategies where maximum loss is known upfront (e.g., spreads, iron condors); always preferred over undefined risk (naked options) for risk management

nodes.label: Probability of Profit (POP)
nodes.description: Calculate actual POP considering strike price, premium, DTE, IV; delta approximates probability of expiring ITM; selling 0.30 delta options gives ~70% POP

nodes.label: Expected Value (EV)
nodes.description: EV = (Win Rate × Average Win) - (Loss Rate × Average Loss); positive EV means trade is mathematically profitable over time

nodes.label: IV Rank
nodes.description: Current IV relative to its 52-week high/low range; formula: (Current IV - 52w Low) / (52w High - 52w Low); key for strategy selection

nodes.label: IV Percentile
nodes.description: Where current IV ranks relative to the past year; > 70% = premium selling opportunities, < 30% = premium buying opportunities

nodes.label: Monte Carlo Simulation
nodes.description: Advanced analytics technique testing thousands of possible price paths to estimate probability distributions and validate strategy robustness

nodes.label: Sharpe Ratio
nodes.description: Risk-adjusted returns metric; measures excess return per unit of risk; higher is better

nodes.label: Maximum Drawdown
nodes.description: Largest peak-to-trough decline in portfolio value; drawdown limits: 10% review, 15% cut sizes, 20% stop trading, 25% close everything

nodes.label: Buying Power Reduction (BPR)
nodes.description: Amount of margin/cash required to maintain a position; varies by broker and strategy

nodes.label: Win Rate
nodes.description: Percentage of trades that are profitable; high win rate doesn't guarantee overall profitability; target 60%+ for consistency

nodes.label: Profit Factor
nodes.description: Ratio of gross profits to gross losses; above 1.5 is generally considered good

nodes.label: Days to Expiration (DTE)
nodes.description: Number of calendar days until option expiration; important metric for time decay; optimal selling window 30-45 DTE

nodes.label: LEAPS
nodes.description: Long-term Equity Anticipation Securities; options with expiration dates more than 1 year away; often used for PMCC strategy

nodes.label: Rolling Options
nodes.description: Closing an existing option position and simultaneously opening a new one at different strike and/or expiration; types: roll out, roll up, roll down

nodes.label: Assignment
nodes.description: When option seller is required to fulfill obligation; put seller must buy 100 shares, call seller must sell 100 shares; can occur any time for American-style options

nodes.label: Cost Basis
nodes.description: Effective entry price including premiums collected/paid; used to calculate true P&L; GammaLedger calculates effective cost basis accounting for all premiums across rolls

nodes.label: Concentration Risk
nodes.description: Risk from repeated trades in one ticker, sector, expiration, strategy, or account; can magnify losses; mitigate with diversification

nodes.label: Portfolio Greeks
nodes.description: Sum of all position deltas/gammas/thetas/vegas; provides total directional exposure and risk metrics; target: -50 to +50 delta for neutral portfolio

nodes.label: Earnings IV Crush Play
nodes.description: Sell options right before earnings when IV is inflated; profit from IV collapse after announcement even if stock moves; binary risk from large post-earnings gaps

nodes.label: Volatility Mean Reversion
nodes.description: Implied volatility tends to revert to mean; if HV and IV diverge, they will soon converge; basis for volatility trading strategies

nodes.label: Volatility Pairs Trading
nodes.description: Trade relative volatility between correlated stocks; sell strangle on high-IV stock, buy strangle on low-IV stock; profit when volatility normalizes

nodes.label: Dynamic Hedging
nodes.description: Professional approach to rebalancing delta neutral positions continuously; adjusts hedges as markets change; low vol = minimal hedging, high vol = heavy hedges

nodes.label: Beta-Weighted Delta
nodes.description: Adjust deltas based on correlation to benchmark (SPY); Beta-Weighted Delta = Position Delta × Beta to SPY; provides true market exposure across portfolio

nodes.label: Tail Risk Hedging
nodes.description: Buying very cheap, far OTM puts as insurance; expires worthless most of the time but worth significant gains in a crash; 1-2% of portfolio annually

nodes.label: Broken Wing Butterfly
nodes.description: Butterfly with strikes not equally spaced, skewing risk/reward; creates directional bias while maintaining limited risk

nodes.label: Diagonal Spread
nodes.description: Calendar spread with different strikes AND different expirations; creates directional bias while capturing time decay

nodes.label: Ratio Spread
nodes.description: Use unequal numbers of contracts; can achieve delta neutrality; e.g., buy 1 ATM call, sell 2 OTM calls for net zero delta

nodes.label: Layering Strategy
nodes.description: Build positions gradually, not all at once; enter 2-3 positions at a time across the week; average into positions, reduce timing risk

nodes.label: Barbell Strategy
nodes.description: Combine weekly options with longer-dated positions; 70% in 30-60 day options for stability, 30% in weeklies for income generation

nodes.label: Riding the Gamma Bull
nodes.description: Trading positions with high gamma in expiration week; small stock movements cause large P&L swings; colloquial term for high-risk near-expiration positions

nodes.label: Pre-Trade Analytics Workflow
nodes.description: Step-by-step pre-trade process: market context (VIX, trend), stock analysis (support/resistance, HV), options chain analysis (bid-ask, OI, IV rank), strategy selection based on conditions

nodes.label: Portfolio Hedging
nodes.description: Protection strategies: protective puts on index (1-2% annual cost), tail risk hedging (far OTM puts), converting undefined to defined risk; dynamic hedging based on vol regime

nodes.label: Blog Post: Getting Started
nodes.description: First blog post in the series; introduces GammaLedger, quick start guide, import workflow, dashboard overview, strategy tracking, privacy-first architecture

nodes.label: Blog Post: Options Glossary
nodes.description: Second blog post; comprehensive reference of all options terminology needed to use GammaLedger and trade options

nodes.label: Blog Post: Essential Strategies

nodes.label: Blog Post: Analytics Guide
nodes.description: Fourth blog post; deep dive into Delta/Gamma Greeks and building an analytics workflow

nodes.label: Blog Post: Weekly Strategies
nodes.description: Fifth blog post; weekly options strategies for faster theta decay and frequent income

nodes.label: Blog Post: Advanced Spreads
nodes.description: Sixth blog post; iron condors, butterflies, and calendar spreads explained with management techniques

nodes.label: Blog Post: Straddle/Strangle Strategies
nodes.description: Seventh blog post; volatility-based strategies with straddles and strangles for any market condition

nodes.label: Blog Post: Setup Tutorial
nodes.description: Eighth blog post; comprehensive 10-part tutorial for GammaLedger setup and advanced features

nodes.label: Blog Post: Risk Management
nodes.description: Ninth blog post; 10 essential risk management rules every options trader must master

nodes.label: Blog Post: Time Decay & Volatility
nodes.description: Tenth blog post; how theta and vega drive options pricing and strategy selection

nodes.label: Blog Post: Delta Neutral Strategies
nodes.description: Eleventh blog post; delta neutral trading for market-independent returns

nodes.description: GNU Affero General Public License v3.0; governs rights to copy, modify, distribute, run, or host GammaLedger source code; commercial use may require separate license

nodes.label: Local-First Architecture
nodes.description: All data stored locally in browser; zero cloud storage; optional integrations may send selected data to third parties; user controls all data

nodes.label: Finnhub API Integration
nodes.description: Optional real-time market data integration; requires API key (free tier available); provides live quotes and auto-refresh

nodes.description: Optional AI-assisted features using Gemini-compatible API; provides portfolio commentary, risk summaries, strategy discussions; requires user consent; falls back to local agent

nodes.description: Import trade data from brokers via OFX or CSV files; supports TD Ameritrade, Interactive Brokers, E*TRADE; auto-detects strategy, calculates Greeks, links related legs

nodes.description: Detailed analysis of 5 successful options trades showing setup to execution using GammaLedger analytics

nodes.description: In-depth comparison of CSPs and covered calls with examples, profit/loss diagrams, and decision matrix

nodes.label: Options Trading: Versatility Without Complexity
nodes.description: How to use options spreads to adapt to any market condition with probability, leverage, and strategy edge

nodes.label: Options Greeks: Gamma
nodes.description: Gamma: how it measures delta's change and implications for risk and strategy

nodes.description: Quantitative analysis of seven tickers for premium selling with scoring framework

nodes.label: GammaLedger's Local-First Options Journal
nodes.description: How GammaLedger keeps options trade tracking local, private, portable, and practical

nodes.description: GammaLedger's import workflow, review queue, merge tools, split-fill handling, and AI screenshot extraction

nodes.description: How GammaLedger models option legs, cash flows, rolls, closes, stock assignments, and settlement

nodes.label: Wheel Strategy
nodes.description: Three-phase income strategy: sell CSPs, get assigned, sell covered calls, repeat

nodes.label: Cash-Secured Put (CSP)
nodes.description: Sell a put option with cash reserved to buy shares at strike if assigned

nodes.label: Covered Call
nodes.description: Sell a call option against owned shares to collect premium income

nodes.label: Poor Man's Covered Call (PMCC)
nodes.description: Capital-efficient alternative: buy LEAPS call, sell short-term calls against it

nodes.label: Iron Condor
nodes.description: Defined-risk spread: sell OTM call+put, buy further OTM call+put for range-bound profit

nodes.label: Iron Butterfly
nodes.description: Defined-risk volatility play: sell ATM call+put, buy wings for protection

nodes.label: Calendar Spread
nodes.description: Sell front-month option, buy back-month option at same strike for IV/theta play

nodes.label: Credit Spread
nodes.description: Bull put spread or bear call spread: defined-risk premium collection

nodes.label: Debit Spread
nodes.description: Bull call spread or bear put spread: directional trade with defined risk

nodes.label: Covered Strangle
nodes.description: Sell covered call + cash-secured put simultaneously for double premium collection

nodes.label: Straddle
nodes.description: Buy ATM call + ATM put to profit from large price movement in either direction

nodes.label: Strangle
nodes.description: Sell OTM call and OTM put at different strikes for range-bound premium

nodes.label: Delta
nodes.description: Measures option price sensitivity to $1 change in underlying stock price

nodes.label: Theta
nodes.description: Measures time decay: daily drop in option value from passage of time

nodes.label: Gamma
nodes.description: Measures rate of change of delta; increases near expiration

nodes.label: Vega
nodes.description: Measures sensitivity to changes in implied volatility

nodes.label: Rho
nodes.description: Measures sensitivity to interest rate changes; most relevant for LEAPS

nodes.label: Implied Volatility (IV)
nodes.description: Market's estimate of future volatility, priced into options

nodes.label: IV Rank / IV Percentile
nodes.description: IV relative to its 52-week range; used to time premium selling

nodes.label: Time Decay
nodes.description: Options lose value as expiration approaches; benefits option sellers

nodes.label: Premium Collection
nodes.description: Income received upfront from selling options contracts

nodes.label: Cost Basis
nodes.description: Effective entry price for shares after accounting for premiums collected

nodes.label: Probability of Profit
nodes.description: Likelihood an option trade finishes profitable, based on delta and market pricing

nodes.label: Position Sizing
nodes.description: Allocating capital per trade (5-10% rule) to manage risk

nodes.label: Rolling
nodes.description: Closing existing option and opening new one at different strike/expiry to adjust or extend

nodes.label: Assignment
nodes.description: Obligation to buy (put) or sell (call) 100 shares at strike price

nodes.label: LEAPS
nodes.description: Long-term options (>12 months expiration); used as stock replacement in PMCC

nodes.label: Gamma Scalping
nodes.description: Advanced strategy exploiting delta changes from gamma while managing delta risk

nodes.label: IV Crush
nodes.description: Dramatic drop in implied volatility after events like earnings announcements

nodes.label: Volatility Mean Reversion
nodes.description: Tendency of IV to revert to historical average after deviations

nodes.label: Stop Loss / Adjustment Triggers
nodes.description: Predefined rules for cutting losses or adjusting positions

nodes.label: Early Profit Taking
nodes.description: Closing positions at 50-75% max profit rather than waiting for expiration

nodes.label: Portfolio Diversification
nodes.description: Spreading positions across sectors and strategies to reduce concentration risk

nodes.label: Trade Journaling
nodes.description: Documenting pre-trade analysis, during-trade notes, and post-trade review

nodes.label: Monte Carlo Projection
nodes.description: Statistical simulation of possible forward P&L paths using historical returns

nodes.label: R-Multiple Analysis
nodes.description: Measuring trade outcomes as multiples of initial risk

nodes.label: Profit Factor
nodes.description: Ratio of gross profits to gross losses across trades

nodes.label: Win Rate
nodes.description: Percentage of trades that close profitably

nodes.label: Sharpe Ratio
nodes.description: Risk-adjusted return metric measuring excess return per unit of volatility

nodes.label: Drawdown
nodes.description: Peak-to-trough decline in portfolio value

nodes.label: Annualized Return
nodes.description: Trade return extrapolated to a full year for comparison

nodes.label: Bid-Ask Spread
nodes.description: Difference between highest buy and lowest sell price; affects execution quality

nodes.label: Open Interest
nodes.description: Total number of outstanding option contracts; indicates liquidity

nodes.label: Days to Expiration (DTE)
nodes.description: Number of calendar days until option expires; affects theta and gamma

nodes.label: Breakeven Price
nodes.description: Stock price at which trade P&L is zero after accounting for premiums

nodes.label: Maximum Risk
nodes.description: Largest possible loss on a position; defined for spreads, undefined for naked options

nodes.label: Profit Zone
nodes.description: Range of stock prices at expiration where trade is profitable

nodes.label: Expected Move
nodes.description: Market's implied range for stock price movement over a period

nodes.label: Wash Sale Rule
nodes.description: IRS rule preventing tax deduction if substantially identical security bought within 30 days

nodes.label: American-Style Option
nodes.description: Option that can be exercised at any time before expiration, including early assignment

nodes.label: Collateral / Buying Power
nodes.description: Cash reserved to cover potential assignment on cash-secured puts

nodes.label: Dividend Income
nodes.description: Additional income from holding shares during Wheel's covered call phase

nodes.label: Paper Trading
nodes.description: Simulated trading without real capital to learn strategy mechanics

nodes.label: OFX/QFX Import
nodes.description: Broker export format parsing for trade history import into GammaLedger

nodes.label: Robinhood CSV Import
nodes.description: Robinhood-specific CSV format parsing with split-fill consolidation

nodes.label: AI Screenshot Extraction
nodes.description: Using AI Coach to extract trade data from broker screenshots for draft import

nodes.label: Import Review Queue
nodes.description: Safety layer for uncertain imports requiring trader approval before trust

nodes.label: Leg-Level Cash Flow
nodes.description: Cash effect calculated from each option leg's action, premium, quantity, and fees

nodes.label: Lifecycle Status
nodes.description: Derived trade status (Open, Rolling, Closed, Assigned, Expired) from leg evaluation

nodes.label: Multi-Leg Trade
nodes.description: Trade consisting of multiple option legs executed over time as one coherent position

nodes.label: Effective Cost Basis
nodes.description: Assignment price reduced by all premiums collected across put and call legs

nodes.label: Credit Playbook
nodes.description: GammaLedger's focused review surface for premium-selling trades with metrics and filters

nodes.label: Dashboard Analytics
nodes.description: GammaLedger's performance measurement surface with charts, metrics, and attribution

nodes.label: AI Coach
nodes.description: Optional Gemini-powered review assistant for portfolio analysis and screenshot extraction

nodes.label: Local-First Architecture
nodes.description: Privacy-by-design: trade data stays in browser/device unless user opts into integrations

nodes.label: API Key Encryption
nodes.description: Browser cryptography used to encrypt stored API keys for Finnhub and Gemini

nodes.label: AI Data Consent
nodes.description: Explicit opt-in notice before sending any portfolio data to external AI providers

nodes.description: Top-scored ticker in April watchlist; low-beta SaaS with all strategies viable

nodes.description: Used in PMCC pullback management example

nodes.label: GammaLedger
nodes.description: Local-first options trading journal and analytics dashboard

nodes.label: Stock Selection Criteria
nodes.description: Five criteria for Wheel: financial stability, quality, liquidity, volatility, price range

nodes.label: Delta-Based Strike Selection
nodes.description: Using delta (0.25-0.35) to select strikes with 65-75% probability of profit

nodes.label: 30-45 DTE Sweet Spot
nodes.description: Optimal expiration range balancing theta decay and gamma risk

nodes.label: Recovery Playbook
nodes.description: Structured approach to managing assigned stock through covered call premium recovery

nodes.label: Dual Income (Dividends + Premium)
nodes.description: Combining dividend yield with covered call premium for enhanced total return

nodes.description: Blog post explaining how GammaLedger uses optional Finnhub integration to enrich position review with quotes, company data, earnings, news, recommendations, and risk context.

nodes.description: Blog post covering local JSON backups, CSV export, portfolio snapshot sharing, and privacy-conscious reporting workflows.

nodes.description: Blog post providing a practical weekly workflow for importing trades, reviewing open risk, checking strategy performance, exporting backups, and using GammaLedger consistently.

nodes.label: Delta Greek Definition
nodes.description: Black and white definition card showing the Greek letter delta (δ) with text 'DELTA - Sensitivity To Stock Price'. Educational reference for options Greeks.

nodes.label: Gamma Greek Definition
nodes.description: Black and white definition card showing the Greek letter gamma (γ) with text 'GAMMA - Delta Sensitivity To Stock Price'. Educational reference for options Greeks.

nodes.label: AI Coach with Market Data Integration
nodes.description: Futuristic UI illustration showing GammaLedger's AI Coach feature connected to local-first data, screenshot-to-draft import, and optional market data enrichment. Shows chat interface with portfolio questions like 'What's my portfolio delta exposure by expiry?' Labels: LOCAL PRIVACY, EXPLICIT CONSENT, OPTIONAL ENRICHMENT.

nodes.label: Credit Playbook Dashboard
nodes.description: Premium selling performance dashboard showing Credit Playbook view. Displays strategies (Bull Put Spread, Bear Call Spread, Cash-Secured Put, Covered Call, Iron Condor, Short Put Spread, Short Call Spread, Poor Man's Covered Call) with columns for Position, Status, DTE, Premium Collected, Risk/Contract, POP, Delta, Theme, and P&L. Bottom sections show Portfolio Summary, Diversification, DTE Exposure, Risk Distribution, and P&L Distribution.

nodes.label: Dashboard Analytics Overview
nodes.description: Main GammaLedger analytics dashboard showing multiple chart widgets including donut charts, cumulative P&L line chart, bar charts, heatmap, Monte Carlo simulation paths, and gauge indicators in dark theme.

nodes.label: Export, Backup, and Share Workflow
nodes.description: Illustration of GammaLedger's export and backup system showing a dashboard with cumulative P&L chart connected to JSON file backup, database storage with lock icon, and share card output. Visualizes data portability and privacy-conscious sharing.

nodes.label: Import Review Queue
nodes.description: Import review interface showing three input sources (OFX/QFX, CSV, Screenshot) flowing into a Review Queue with tabs for All, New, Merge Candidates, Possible Duplicates, and Ignored. Right panel shows Normalized Option Trades with leg-level details (B/S markers). Activity sidebar tracks: Files detected, Parsing complete, Trades extracted, Duplicates identified, Merge candidates found, Normalization complete, Ready for review.

nodes.label: Local-First Privacy Architecture
nodes.description: Illustration of GammaLedger's local-first architecture showing a laptop with portfolio dashboard, payoff diagrams, and risk visualizations connected to a local encrypted storage cube with lock and shield icons. Emphasizes data stays on user's device.

nodes.description: Visualization of multi-leg options trade lifecycle showing four stages: OPEN, ROLL, ASSIGNMENT, and CLOSE. Each stage displays leg cards with C (Call), P (Put), and chart icons connected by dotted lines. Bottom legend shows leg type icons.

nodes.label: Options Tracker Stage Presentation

nodes.label: Structured Context Architecture

A 'Context Package' card flows machine-readable structured data (Portfolio Snapshot, Positions & Legs, Risk Metrics, Exposures, Assignment State, Price Analytics, Account Context, Preferences, Timestamps & Meta) to an 'External Analysis Workspace' with Impact Simulation, Scenario Analysis, Distribution View, Risk Decomposition, and Outcome Probabilities.

nodes.label: Wheel/PMCC Lifecycle Dashboard
nodes.description: Wheel and PMCC lifecycle visualization showing circular stages: START, SELL PUT, ASSIGNED, COLLECT PREMIUM, SELL CALL, CALLED AWAY. Right panel shows PMCC calendar spread with Long Stock, Long Call, Short Call, and Roll/Adjust components. Bottom sections: Effective Cost Basis, Covered Call Coverage, Premium Flow, Total Premium Collected, Assignments, Rolls, Win Rate, and Portfolio Health.

nodes.label: Rho Greek Definition
nodes.description: Black and white definition card showing the Greek letter rho (ρ) with text 'RHO - Sensitivity To Interest Rates'. Educational reference for options Greeks.

nodes.label: Theta Greek Definition
nodes.description: Black and white definition card showing the Greek letter theta (θ) with text 'THETA - Sensitivity To Time'. Educational reference for options Greeks.

nodes.label: Vega Options Greek Card
nodes.description: Black-and-white graphic card displaying the Vega options Greek — shows the Greek letter ν (nu) with label 'VEGA' and subtitle 'Sensitivity To Volatility' in a rounded rectangle frame.

nodes.label: GammaLedger Blog Listing Page
nodes.description: Jekyll-powered blog index page with tag-based filtering (Tutorials, Strategies, Guides, Getting Started), post card grid with Liquid templating, and client-side JS for tag filtering and hash-based URL routing.

nodes.label: Blog Filter: Tutorials
nodes.description: Filter tag for tutorial-category blog posts

nodes.description: Filter tag for strategy-category blog posts

nodes.description: Filter tag for guide-category blog posts

nodes.description: Filter tag for getting-started-category blog posts

nodes.label: Blog Tag Filtering System
nodes.description: Client-side JavaScript tag filtering system that shows/hides blog cards based on data-tags attributes, with active state management on filter buttons.

nodes.label: Blog Hash-Based Routing
nodes.description: Inline JavaScript that intercepts hash URLs (e.g. #/post-id) and redirects to the corresponding blog post permalink.
